claim: No Stable, release, complete accessibility, provider-security, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: Header, complementary folder tree, main file list, preview, native rename/move forms, progress and recovery status.
semantics.rolePolicy: TreeView and UploadProgress own their documented semantics; enhancement-only status output is absent when disabled.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through view, folder, file, preview and action controls in document order.
Navigate and expand folders according to the canonical TreeView contract, including RTL reversal.
Activates focused native buttons and tree selection.

nonColor: Names, text status, borders, native progress, headings and explicit conflict/recovery copy accompany color.
responsive: The folder rail and preview collapse into logical block order; files remain usable at 320 CSS pixels and 400 percent zoom.
consumerResponsibilities: Authorize every adapter operation server-side and revalidate type, size, path, conflict and permission state.
Supply upload, malware/security review, privacy, retention, storage, recovery expiry and legal policy.
Localize text and retest keyboard, touch, zoom, RTL, forced colors and supported assistive technologies.
Do not claim Stable until every promotion delta has current evidence.
